title: Spicy Korean Beef Skewers
description: Grilled skewers of marinated beef, inspired by Korean BBQ. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, Gochujang, brown sugar, garlic, and sesame oil.
Add thinly sliced beef to the marinade and mix well.
Thread beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Sprinkle with green onions and serve immediately.
Let beef rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve with additional soy sauce and Gochujang for dipping.
Garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
